name: serial-mcp
description: Headless MCP server for AI-assisted embedded-board serial log debugging.

interface.shortDescription: Read embedded-board serial logs through MCP.
interface.longDescription: Serial MCP lets Codex inspect ESP32, STM32, and other embedded-board text logs through a read-only FastMCP server. Codex currently needs the MCP server registered through top-level codex mcp configuration, so this plugin ships the debugging skill plus scripts/install-codex.ps1 to add the server without hand-editing config.toml.
defaultPrompt: Use Serial MCP to inspect board logs and run a clear, trigger, query debugging loop.
